channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: Cuba Warns Of "Bloodbath" If US Attacks

media:content.media:description: Diaz-Canel repeated that Cuba "poses no threat" to the United States.

item.description: Cuba's leader warned Monday of a "bloodbath" in the event of an American attack, while the US Treasury sanctioned Cuba's main intelligence agency and top leaders as tensions spiked between the arch-foes.
item.content:encoded: Cuba's leader warned Monday of a "bloodbath" in the event of an American attack, while the US Treasury sanctioned Cuba's main intelligence agency and top leaders as tensions spiked between the arch-foes.

item.title: Meta Plans May 20 Layoffs, To Cut 10% Of Its Global Workforce

media:content.media:description: Meta detailed its layoff plans for this week in a memo shared with employees on Monday.

item.description: As part of that, the company plans to move 7,000 employees to new initiatives related to AI workflows and to eliminate managerial roles, she said.
item.content:encoded: As part of that, the company plans to move 7,000 employees to new initiatives related to AI workflows and to eliminate managerial roles, she said.

item.title: Key Moments In Elon Musk Vs OpenAI Trial

media:content.media:description: During trial, Sam Altman recalled Musk once demanding a 90% stake in OpenAI.

item.description: The jury decided Musk waited too long to sue. Musk had sought about $150 billion in damages from OpenAI and Microsoft, a major investor, to be paid to OpenAI's nonprofit. Musk also sought the removal of Altman and Brockman.
item.content:encoded: The jury decided Musk waited too long to sue. Musk had sought about $150 billion in damages from OpenAI and Microsoft, a major investor, to be paid to OpenAI's nonprofit. Musk also sought the removal of Altman and Brockman.

item.title: Trump Holds Off On Planned Iran Strike After Gulf Allies' Request

media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump said he is holding off on a military strike on Iran planned for Tuesday.

item.description: Trump's announcement in a social media post Monday came as he had threated the clock was ticking for Iran to strike a deal or fighting would renew after a fragile ceasefire.
item.content:encoded: Trump's announcement in a social media post Monday came as he had threated the clock was ticking for Iran to strike a deal or fighting would renew after a fragile ceasefire.

item.title: US Iran War News Live Updates: Trump Holds Off Iran Attack Planned For Tuesday After Gulf Intervention
item.description: US Iran War News LIVE Updates: Israel launched a massive series of airstrikes on southern Lebanon, despite an extension of the truce between the two countries.
item.content:encoded: US Iran War News LIVE Updates: Israel launched a massive series of airstrikes on southern Lebanon, despite an extension of the truce between the two countries.

item.title: Team Trump Creates $1.7 Billion Fund For Allies Prosecuted Under Biden

media:content.media:description: Trump has taken a number of punitive measures against perceived enemies

item.description: US President Donald Trump's Justice Department announced on Monday the creation of a $1.7 billion fund to compensate political allies prosecuted under the Biden administration.
item.content:encoded: US President Donald Trump's Justice Department announced on Monday the creation of a $1.7 billion fund to compensate political allies prosecuted under the Biden administration.

item.title: Elon Musk Loses Lawsuit Against OpenAI, Jury Finds He 'Waited Too Long'

media:content.media:description: Musk, the world's richest man, was a co-founder of OpenAI.

item.description: Elon Musk Loses Lawsuit Against OpenAI, Jury Finds He 'Waited Too Long'
item.content:encoded: Elon Musk Loses Lawsuit Against OpenAI, Jury Finds He 'Waited Too Long'

item.title: UK Cops Find 90-kg Cocaine In Shipment Of Kim Kardashian's Shapewear Brand

media:content.media:description: The truck driver has been sentenced to 13.5 years in prison.

item.description: A British court sentenced a truck driver to prison for smuggling $9.4 million worth of cocaine in the shipment.
item.content:encoded: A British court sentenced a truck driver to prison for smuggling $9.4 million worth of cocaine in the shipment.

item.title: 4 Dead, 8 Injured As Gunman Opens Fire In Southern Turkey: Report

media:content.media:description: A widespread police manhunt was under way.

item.description: 4 Dead, 8 Injured As Gunman Opens Fire In Southern Turkey: Report
item.content:encoded: 4 Dead, 8 Injured As Gunman Opens Fire In Southern Turkey: Report

item.title: PM Modi Highlights Trade Growth At India-Norway Business And Research Summit

media:content.media:description: Prime Minister Modi also underscored India's ambitious green transition agenda

item.description: The summit was attended by CEOs of over 50 companies and more than 250 participants from the Norwegian and Indian business and research communities.
item.content:encoded: The summit was attended by CEOs of over 50 companies and more than 250 participants from the Norwegian and Indian business and research communities.

item.title: PM Modi Backs Dialogue, Diplomacy To Resolve Ukraine, Middle East Tensions

media:content.media:description: The prime minister said the 'Green Strategic Partnership' will be beneficial for the entire world.

item.description: India and Norway have firmed up a Green Strategic Partnership, as Prime Minister Narendra Modi and his Norwegian counterpart Jonas Gahr Store held wide-ranging talks during which they called for resolving the tensions in Ukraine and West Asia through dialogue and diplomacy.
item.content:encoded: India and Norway have firmed up a Green Strategic Partnership, as Prime Minister Narendra Modi and his Norwegian counterpart Jonas Gahr Store held wide-ranging talks during which they called for resolving the tensions in Ukraine and West Asia through dialogue and diplomacy.

item.title: US Extends Waiver On Sanctioned Russian Oil By Another 30 Days

media:content.media:description: The US first issued a sanctions waiver on Russian oil cargoes that were at sea in March. (File)

item.description: This is the second time US authorities have extended the temporary measure, which is meant to address oil supply shortages sparked by the US-Israel war on Iran.
item.content:encoded: This is the second time US authorities have extended the temporary measure, which is meant to address oil supply shortages sparked by the US-Israel war on Iran.

item.title: Oil Prices Dip After Report Of US Suspending Iranian Crude Sanctions

media:content.media:description: Brent crude, West Texas Intermediate prices fell on Monday.

item.description: The unconfirmed report by Iranian media cited an unnamed source, but analysts and traders seized on the news.
item.content:encoded: The unconfirmed report by Iranian media cited an unnamed source, but analysts and traders seized on the news.

item.title: No Ebola Case In India, Airports Put On Alert After WHO Warning
item.description: The Centre has reviewed standard operating procedures for screening, surveillance, quarantine and case management, while laboratory preparedness is also being ramped up. The National Institute of Virology (NIV), Pune has been designated for Ebola tes
item.content:encoded: The Centre has reviewed standard operating procedures for screening, surveillance, quarantine and case management, while laboratory preparedness is also being ramped up. The National Institute of Virology (NIV), Pune has been designated for Ebola tes

item.title: Iran Announces New Body To Give "Real-Time Updates" On Strait Of Hormuz

media:content.media:description: The Strait of Hormuz is one of the world's most strategically vital maritime routes. (File)

item.description: Iran has largely blocked shipping through the vital Strait of Hormuz since the outbreak of war with the United States and Israel on February 28.
item.content:encoded: Iran has largely blocked shipping through the vital Strait of Hormuz since the outbreak of war with the United States and Israel on February 28.

item.title: PM Modi Receives Norway's Highest Civilian Honour, 32nd Global Award For Him

media:content.media:description: It is awarded for exceptional service in advancing Norway's interests and international relations.

item.description: The Grand Cross is the highest grade of the Royal Norwegian Order of Merit.
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1100986/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>The Grand Cross is the highest grade of the Royal Norwegian Order of Merit.

item.title: The Missile Is Dead. Long Live The Map: How Iran Invented 'Future Of War'
item.description: Iran's weaponisation of the Strait of Hormuz - squeezing energy flows and simultaneously threatening subsea cables - has re-introduced the world to structural leverage warfare and marked it as the future of conflict.
item.content:encoded: Iran's weaponisation of the Strait of Hormuz - squeezing energy flows and simultaneously threatening subsea cables - has re-introduced the world to structural leverage warfare and marked it as the future of conflict.

item.title: "Grown Bit Too Complex": Ikea To Cut 850 Jobs At Parent Company

media:content.media:description: Ikea said the job cuts were necessary to simpify its structure.

item.description: Of the 850 staff positions being cut, around 300 will be in Sweden based on current plans, Inter Ikea said. The company reported a 32% drop in profit in FY25.
item.content:encoded: Of the 850 staff positions being cut, around 300 will be in Sweden based on current plans, Inter Ikea said. The company reported a 32% drop in profit in FY25.

item.title: Pak, Mediator For Iran, Deploys Thousands Of Troops, Jets In Saudi: Report

media:content.media:description: Pakistan has deployed 16 aircraft to Saudi Arabia, mostly JF-17 fighters. (Reuters)

item.description: Pakistan has deployed a full squadron of around 16 aircraft, mostly JF-17 fighters made jointly with China. The deployment includes around 8,000 troops.
item.content:encoded: Pakistan has deployed a full squadron of around 16 aircraft, mostly JF-17 fighters made jointly with China. The deployment includes around 8,000 troops.

item.title: Bodies Of Missing Italian Divers Found Inside 60-Metre Cave After Maldives Scuba Disaster

media:content.media:description: Cave diving is widely regarded as one of the most dangerous forms of scuba diving.

item.description: The incident is believed to be the deadliest single diving accident in the Maldives, a country known globally for its coral islands and luxury diving tourism.
item.content:encoded: The incident is believed to be the deadliest single diving accident in the Maldives, a country known globally for its coral islands and luxury diving tourism.
